auth.name: Name
auth.loginFailed: Login failed. Please check your credentials.
auth.forgotPasswordDesc: Enter the email address you registered with and we'll send you a password reset link.
auth.resetLinkSentDesc: A password reset link has been sent to {email}. Please check your inbox (and spam folder).
auth.resetEmailFailed: Failed to send. Please verify your email address is correct.
auth.resetStep2: Click the reset link (valid for 1 hour)
auth.resetStep3: Set a new password and sign in
auth.resetSuccessDesc: Your password has been successfully reset. Please sign in with your new password.
auth.resetLinkInstruction: Click the link below to reset your password:

notFound.title: Lost in the Void
notFound.description: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved to another dimension.

errors.network: Network error. Please check your connection
errors.unauthorized: You are not authorized. Please login
errors.serverError: Server error. Please try again later

home.title: Koa + Next.js
home.description: A modern full-stack application template using Koa.js with native SQL for high-performance backend, and Next.js 16 with Turbopack for elegant frontend. No ORM overhead, transparent and controllable code.

coreFeatures.title: Why KoaNext
coreFeatures.subtitle: Compared to traditional full-stack solutions, we're lighter, more transparent, and easier to customize

lightweight.title: Lightweight Backend
lightweight.description: Built on Koa.js, lighter and more efficient than traditional frameworks. No cumbersome dependency injection or decorators, code is more intuitive and easier to understand.
lightweight.highlight: Native SQL + connection pool, no ORM performance overhead
lightweight.problem: NestJS is too heavy, TypeORM has performance bottlenecks
lightweight.solution: Koa minimalist core + MySQL2 native queries

nativeSQL.title: Native SQL Operations
nativeSQL.description: Use MySQL2 connection pool to directly operate the database. No need to learn ORM syntax, write SQL as you query, better performance.
nativeSQL.highlight: Transparent, controllable, high-performance data access layer
nativeSQL.problem: ORM black box, complex queries hard to optimize
nativeSQL.solution: Native SQL + parameterized queries, safe and efficient

auth.title: Complete Auth System
auth.description: JWT dual-token mechanism + Redis storage, supports complete flows including login, registration, token refresh, and password reset.
auth.problem: Implementing auth system yourself is time-consuming

frontend.title: Modern Frontend Architecture
frontend.description: Next.js 16 with Turbopack + React Server Components, supports SSR streaming rendering, faster first-screen loading, and 10x faster dev server.
frontend.highlight: Turbopack HMR + Internationalized routing + Server-side data prefetching
frontend.problem: SPA has poor SEO and slow first-screen loading
frontend.solution: Next.js 16 SSR + Turbopack + intelligent data fetching

codeExamples.title: Code Examples
codeExamples.subtitle: Clean, intuitive, and maintainable code style

uiShowcases.title: UI Highlights
uiShowcases.subtitle: Carefully designed user interface, excellence in details

passwordToggle.title: Password Visibility Toggle
passwordToggle.description: Built-in eye icon in input field, one-click toggle password visibility

formValidation.title: Form Validation
formValidation.description: Zod real-time validation with friendly error messages

features.title: Features
features.subtitle: Enterprise-grade features out of the box

koa.title: Koa.js
koa.description: Next-generation Node.js web framework, onion model middleware, native async/await support.

nextjs.title: Next.js 16
nextjs.description: React framework with Turbopack, App Router, Server Components, and streaming rendering. 10x faster dev server.

database.title: MySQL + Redis
database.description: MySQL for data storage, Redis for token blacklist and session state management.

jwt.title: JWT Authentication
jwt.description: Access Token + Refresh Token dual-token mechanism, secure and reliable.

i18n.title: Internationalization
i18n.description: Complete i18n support based on next-intl, seamless Chinese/English switching.

typescript.title: TypeScript
typescript.description: Full-stack TypeScript, type-safe with better development experience.

architecture.title: Architecture
architecture.subtitle: Frontend-backend separation with clear responsibilities, easy to maintain and extend

quickStart.title: Quick Start
quickStart.subtitle: Three steps to launch your full-stack project

step1.title: Clone Project
step1.desc: Clone the project from GitHub to your local machine

step2.title: Configure Environment
step2.desc: Copy environment file and modify configuration

step3.title: Start Development
step3.desc: Start Docker services and run migrations

finalCta.title: Start Building Your Next Project
finalCta.description: Use the KoaNext template to quickly launch full-stack development, focus on business logic instead of infrastructure.

footer.tagline: Lightweight full-stack application template, perfect combination of Koa.js + Next.js 16 with Turbopack.
